task_completion.description: The Tracked Entity Attribute name and short name are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the DHIS2 Maintenance app, the Tracked Entity Attribute creation/edit form shows the 'Name' field filled with 'Mother Registration ID' and the 'Short name' field filled with a value.

task_completion.description: The Tracked Entity Attribute value type and searchable property are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tracked Entity Attribute form, the 'Value Type' dropdown is set to 'Text' (or TEXT) and the 'Searchable' checkbox is checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: The Tracked Entity Attribute is successfully created and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The list view of Tracked Entity Attributes in the Maintenance app displays 'Mother Registration ID', indicating it was successfully saved.

task_completion.description: The Relationship Type name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Relationship Type creation/edit form, the 'Name' field is filled with 'Mother-Child'.

task_completion.description: The Relationship Type 'From' and 'To' constraints are set to the Person Tracked Entity Type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Relationship Type form, both the 'From Constraint' and 'To Constraint' sections have 'Tracked Entity Type' selected, and the specific type chosen for both is 'Person'.

task_completion.description: The Relationship Type is successfully created and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The list view of Relationship Types in the Maintenance app displays 'Mother-Child', indicating it was successfully saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the DHIS2 web GUI to configure the metadata.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the DHIS2 Maintenance app in a web browser, rather than using terminal commands, curl, or API scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual DHIS2 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard DHIS2 Maintenance app layout, not a text editor, mock HTML page, or local notes.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of a database client (like pgAdmin or psql terminal) being used to insert the metadata directly into the backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Tracked Entity Attribute must be named 'Mother Registration ID' with Value Type 'TEXT' and the Searchable flag enabled. The target Relationship Type must be named 'Mother-Child' with both 'From' and 'To' constraints set to the 'Person' Tracked Entity Type.
